description_long: This shotgun features a futuristic, tactical design with a predominantly matte gray body accented by black and red detailing. The frame is robust and angular, with a large, integrated foregrip and a compact, squared-off stock. The barrel assembly is enclosed within the main body, with a prominent muzzle and vented shroud at the front. The receiver area includes visible mechanical components and a rail system for attachments. The trigger guard is elongated and reinforced, providing ample space for gloved hands. The overall construction suggests a high-tech, urban combat weapon with advanced ergonomics and modularity.
description: A futuristic, tactical shotgun with a matte gray body, black and red accents, and a robust, angular design featuring a vented barrel shroud and reinforced trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the prominent muzzle, vented barrel shroud, and the symmetrical, angular design of the foregrip.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the shotgun, visible mechanical components, and the integrated foregrip and stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the compact, squared-off stock and the alignment of the upper receiver and rail system.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the trigger guard, grip, and detailed body paneling.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, enclosed within a vented shroud with a prominent muzzle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, reinforced trigger guard with a squared profile and ample space
